full_text:
Tumor tissue was cut and dissociated using Dispase. For 9.7 mL of DMEM/F12, we used 200 uL Dispase, and 100 uL DNAse. Incubated in the oven for 40 min; RBC lysis buffer 4 mL + 20 mL of medium. After centrifuge, we resuspended cells in 4 mL medium, diluted 1:10 and counted cells.

Dispase dissociated cells:

Cell count/ml 1):

total: 1.06 E6

live: 5.59 E5

viability: 52.5 %

size: 8.9 um

Cell count /ml 2):

total: 8.63 E5

live: 5.3 E5

viability: 61.4 %

size: 9.5 um

Total cell count: 9.6 E6 / mL

Total volume: 4 mL

Overall # of cells in 4 mL was 38.4 E6.

We added 5 mL of medium, centrifuged for 5 min. Removed SN, and added 4 mL of Stem Cell Banker. Added 1 mL of cells with Stem Cell Banker into each of 4 cryovials, and froze at -80 (09.04.2024). Each cryovial contains 9.6 E6 cells.
